title: Samsung launches its first US credit card with Barclays, its deepest move into finance yet
summary: The Galaxy Card pays 5% back on Samsung purchases and lives entirely inside Samsung Wallet, as the company signals plans that run beyond a single co-branded card. There is no annual fee, according to Samsung.
caption: output/2026-07-21/samsung-launches-its-first-us-credit-card-with-barclays-its-deepest-mo.txt
